design.deployment: single self-contained HTML; embeds gzip-compressed SQLite + wasm; opens from file:// with no server or network
design.engine: sql.js (SQLite compiled to WebAssembly), vendored offline
interactions: per-gene per-source provenance drill-down with source URLs
CSV export per gene and per query

known_limitations: Embedded provenance covers the top 1000 ranked genes per corpus; lower-ranked genes show score-level metrics and point to the full per-corpus degora_scores.db.
DEGORA scores are relative prioritization indices, not calibrated probabilities.
